observations.evidence: justfile: recipes present default, info, test, lint, verify
README.md: H1 title, description, quick start/getting started/install, usage/examples
asp-targets.toml present; .gitignore present; gaps: asp-lock.json not ignored
gitleaks hook configured; gitleaks local config/ignore present
justfile: lint recipe present; lint config present; hook runs lint yes
justfile: typecheck recipe present; tsconfig present; hook evidence present
justfile: test recipe present; package test present; Go tests not found

F0.rationale: Baseline hygiene remains PM/floor-owned and presence-only; depth scoring checks current source because the PM anchor can be stale.

P0.rationale: agent-spaces is the ASP/runtime layer; local hook verification is the substrate for deeper agent-facing guards.

S1.rationale: Harness dispatch, runtime environment, scope identity, and config materialization cross authority boundaries where illegal states should be unrepresentable when expressible.

S1.authorityChannelSplit.rationale: agent-spaces is the N=1 source for authority-channel split evidence through DispatchEnv and disjoint runtime env handling; record exercise evidence without promoting frontier status.

S2.rationale: Spaces, commands, harness adapters, and package boundaries repeat enough that blessed shapes and scaffolds materially improve construction priors.

S3.rationale: Agents enter through AGENTS.md, package-local routers, and runtime context assembly; disclosure must be reachable and target-specific.

S3.affordanceGating.rationale: agent-spaces dynamically projects context by run mode, path, and environment; this is target-shaping vocabulary.

S4.rationale: Boundary and manifest checks are verify-gating; firing diagnostics should carry fix/why/exception/do-not-suppress fields and their conformance probe should be in the local gate.

S5.rationale: agent-spaces has multiple structural checks; suppression growth must stay ticketed and visible before adding more guards.

S6.rationale: The local hook-enforced verify path is the handoff gate for this local-first repo; cloud publish workflows are not a substitute or requirement.

S7.rationale: Public package surfaces, runtime contract hashes, and generated runtime plans can silently rot without executable sensors.

S7.contractHashClosure.rationale: agent-spaces is the N=1 source for compile/profile/spec/start contract hash closure; record exercise evidence while the graduation ladder waits for corroboration elsewhere.

S8.rationale: The repo carries several verify-gating checks; rule authoring and sunset discipline prevent guard sprawl.

TA.rationale: agent-spaces work relies on coordinator/architect/implementer/verifier separation; high-risk mutation paths are handled by the actuator-split refinement.

TA.actuatorSplit.until: T-05439 hrc-runtime actuator or credential split route is implemented and validated
TA.actuatorSplit.rationale: Credential/actuator separation can be mechanized but the enforcement point partly resides outside agent-spaces.

TB.rationale: Skills and package guidance are active process carriers for this repo.

TB.lifecycleHealth.rationale: Lifecycle telemetry, state, and rollback are the section 10-B frontier refinement; no target-local lifecycle mechanism is claimed.

TC.rationale: The target has an enablement changelog and reassessment/retro cadence; continued value depends on harvesting changes after substantial work.

TD.rationale: A large Bun/TS monorepo benefits from executable entry-point and area explainers computed from live code.

TD.selfDescribingSurfaceConformance.rationale: agent-spaces ships the asp CLI; CLI surface drift was the coordinator-nominated pressure for this axis.

TE.rationale: Harness and runtime changes need acceptance and behavioral specs before claim-scoped evidence routing is considered closed.

TE.claimScopedEvidenceRouting.rationale: The likely enforcement home is a wrkf closeout workflow rather than a simple commit hook; treat as frontier until the workflow carrier proves durable adoption.

TE.crossHarnessConformanceMatrix.rationale: agent-spaces is the N=1 source for the section 10-J cross-harness conformance matrix; record current carrier evidence without making it a required row.

TF.rationale: The project routes real work through wrkq workflow state, but closeout-specific adoption remains separately measured.

TF.workflowAdoption.until: T-05438 measures the closeout workflow adoption tail over real high-risk agent-spaces tasks
TF.workflowAdoption.rationale: The closeout workflow needs measured high-risk task adoption before the refinement can be scored closed.
